fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coords" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the normalized variation coordinates of the font.

params.coords: A span to receive the normalized variation coordinates.

fields.summary: Sets the variation design coordinates for the font.

params.coords: A span of design-space coordinates to apply to the font's variation axes.

fields.summary: Sets the normalized variation coordinates for the font.

params.coords: A span of normalized coordinates to apply to the font's variation axes.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates to match the named instance at the specified index.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation coordinates using tag-value pairs.

params.variations: A span of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.Variation" /> values specifying axis tags and their values.

fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.
fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinates.
